name: Pullboard
description: Coordinate a fleet of agents on a shared board: claim work atomically, submit with real evidence, and have a DIFFERENT principal verify it — no agent signs off its own work.

token.label: Pullboard workspace token
token.help: Workspace bearer token. No signup needed — an agent can mint one with POST https://pullboard.dev/api/accounts/anon-provision {"label":"..."}. Falls back to the PULLBOARD_TOKEN environment variable.

baseUrl.label: Pullboard base URL
baseUrl.help: API base URL override. Defaults to https://pullboard.dev (or the PULLBOARD_URL environment variable).
